NYS Court Officer-Trainee
NYS Court Officer-Trainee #45-843 - List of Passers
This is a list arranged by name and zip code of applicants who
passed
the NYS Court Officer-Trainee 45-843 examination, which was administered in Downstate New York from September 10, 2025 to October 31, 2025.
Applicants who did not receive a passing grade do not appear on this list.
NYS Court Officer-Trainee (Downstate NY) - Exam Information
Per Diem Court Interpreter
Per Diem Court Interpreter - Exam Information
2026 Per Diem Court Interpreter daily rates:
- $300 half day (up to 4 hours)
- $500 full day
All test-related inquiries regarding the Per Diem Court Interpreter written and oral exams should be e-mailed to
